content.en:
After going back.

Ye Tian was ready to use those three resources to improve his strength.

The first is the Origin Insect Pulp, a resource that can refine his Golden Bone on the other side.

So, he picked up a drop of Origin Insect Pulp and used it to refine his other golden bone.

Soon, he roughly judged the effect of the pith of the origin insect.

"You can probably increase your cultivation speed by dozens of times!"

This is already an exaggerated improvement.

The only pity is that the number of Origin Insect Pith is not very large, otherwise he estimates that it only takes two or three thousand primeval years to attack the Origin Realm.

"These Origin Insect Pulp can probably shorten my cultivation time by twenty or thirty thousand primeval eras, which is also very good!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He has been using these Origin Insect Pulp to refine his other golden bones.

Occasionally, he also used the Ziling Gold Liquid to refine his Origin Realm will.

As for the Eternal Mother Liquor, he didn't use it.

The high-grade eternal ancient gold on his replica body was not enough, although the other replica bodies were still looking for the high-grade eternal ancient gold in the ruins on the other side, but there was no way to send it over after all.

Therefore, he was prepared to wait until the right time to use these Eternal Mother Liquor.

Time flies, hundreds of primeval epochs have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already used up all of the Origin Insect Pulp, and the Ziling Gold Liquid had also used up some, and the Origin Realm Will had increased a bit.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating as usual.

Suddenly.

The Lord of Ice and Rain called him over.

So, he immediately went over.

......

"Lord of Ice and Rain, is there anything going on?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said: "Lord of Endless, in the area where the middle of the Land of Eternity meets the Origin Black River, there is an Origin Upper Realm, and its strength is very powerful, even more powerful than the three Origin Upper Realms of our Wind Tooth Island.

The other party's name is the Lord of the Blood Night, and the Lord of the Blood Night's real name is Xiao Changye, and the strength of the Xiao family he is in is not strong, but this generation has also given birth to a genius of the other side.

Not long ago, the Lord of the Blood Night had discovered a special treasure and was preparing to let his descendant of a genius of the other side enter it.

However, that treasure place was very dangerous, and the Origin Realm was not allowed to enter. He could only send some Nine Bone Transformation Realm other side genius guards to protect him, and the Xiao family was this Nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level genius. Therefore, guards can only be recruited from outside.

This is an opportunity, that treasure land is very good, and the guards will also get a share of the resources. So, I'd like to ask if you'd like to make a trip. If you want, I'll sign you up. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

What a chance!

Not only can you get access to the central part of the country, but you can also get resources for free, who wouldn't want it!

As for the danger?

Hehe, he is copying his body, and if he falls, he will fall, and it will not affect anything.

"Okay, I'll apply with you!"

The Lord of the Ice and Rain.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was waiting for news in his dojo palace.

Time passes.

After some time, the Lord of Ice and Rain informed him that he had applied well, but he needed to go to the Xiao family to show a little of his strength.

Because there are a lot of other shore-level geniuses who applied this time, but the Lord of the Blood Night doesn't need so many other-level geniuses, so some will be eliminated.

"Endless Lord, this is a token, you can take it with the Xiao family, I won't accompany you over!"

"It's not too far from the middle of Wind Tooth Island, and you need to pass through an innocent abyss in the middle. You take this leaf with you, and you can easily get there. Remember, this leaf can't be plucked, otherwise terrifying creatures will attack you, and ordinary Origin Realm level geniuses won't be able to bear it!"

said.

The Lord of Ice and Rain handed over a strange leaf to Ye Tian.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

He took the leaf and set off at once.

......

Along.

Ye Tian kept shuttling, occasionally encountering Origin Realm creatures, and he didn't entangle with each other, and fled quickly.

His strength is very strong, so the Lord of Ice and Rain is very relieved, it may be dangerous, but the possibility of falling is very low.

After a long time.

He finally reached the Unsullied Abyss, blocking his way.

"The will of the Origin Realm has been swallowed up by this Innocent Abyss, it is really dangerous!"

He took the strange leaf and flew quickly across the Innocent Abyss.

Nothing happened.

But he knew very well that once he removed this leaf, he was afraid that something would happen!

After passing through the Unsullied Abyss, he hurried away.

Finally, he saw an endless territory, and that was the middle.

Then.

Streams of pure energy were transmitted, and it was the energy in the middle.

Compared to the energy of the central part, the eastern part of the country is really like a barren land.

After a while, he came to the territory where the Xiao family was located.

Subsequently.

With the token given by the Lord of Ice and Rain, he successfully came to the Xiao family, and was arranged by the Xiao family to live in the dojo.

Soon after.

One of the Xiao family's Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors informed Ye Tian to go over.

Soon.

Ye Tian met the high-ranking members of the Xiao family.

At the same time, he also met a lot of geniuses from the other side, and it is estimated that he has also come here during this period of time.

"Everyone, I am the head of the Xiao family, the master of the ice cave, I know that you have all taken the task issued by our Xiao family ancestor, but if the strength is average, we don't want it. Therefore, according to the request of the Ancestor, I need to see your strength, and then decide whether to agree to you to take this task. "

After the Lord of the Ice Cave finished speaking, he let the major other shore-level geniuses fight against him.

Soon.

One by one, the geniuses of the other side went up and fought against the Frozen Lord.

Time passes slowly.

Soon, it was Ye Tian's turn.

"Let's shoot!"

The main path of the Ice Cave.

Ye Tian directly erupted with the golden body on the other side, as well as the will of the Origin Realm.

Bang!!!!!

After a fight, the Lord of the Ice Cave was slightly shocked.

Without saying a word, he directly agreed with Ye Tian to take over this task.

"Endless Lord, you are waiting in our Xiao family, there are probably a few more primeval epochs before the mission will start!"

The Lord of the Ice Cave said.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian waited silently at the Xiao family.

And in these primeval eras, he didn't waste any time, cultivating here.

In the blink of an eye, several primeval eras had passed.

this day.

The Xiao family informed him to go over, and by the way, he also met the Xiao family's other-level genius.

After coming, he saw a very beautiful-looking woman, who was the Xiao family's other-level genius.
